scope_statement: Catalog metadata for Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) IS standards in IT, cybersecurity, and data privacy (LITD 17 subcommittee plus ISO/IEC IT-security family adoptions), plus publicly available IT Act rules and CERT-In / DPDPA references. Full standards text is paid/licensed and is NOT included.
scope_exclusions: Full BIS IS standards text (paid/licensed - purchase from services.bis.gov.in)
ICS codes for live-scraped rows (the public BIS search API does not expose them)
BIS standards outside the LITD 17 IT-security scope (alarm systems, power systems, climate change, medical informatics, agriculture, construction, etc. - filtered out by the ingestion gate)

sources.name: Bureau of Indian Standards - Standard Review Portal
sources.completeness_note: Scope-gated to the LITD 17 IT/cybersecurity subcommittee and explicit ISO/IEC IT-security-family numbers. Full text not included (paid). Curated seed of 19 known IS standards is merged with the live scrape; live rows take precedence.

sources.name: IT Act Section 43A SPDI Rules 2011
sources.authority: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)

sources.name: Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023
sources.authority: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
sources.completeness_note: Linkout / reference only; full act text lives in the MeitY portal.

notes.availability: Every controls row carries availability='paid'. The MCP returns metadata only.
notes.full_text: Full BIS IS standards text requires a paid subscription at https://www.services.bis.gov.in/. This server never fetches or redistributes that text.
